briefdescription.para: PCR index to which data needs to be extended.

detaileddescription.para: PCR0 and PCR1 are reserved. PCR17 to PCR22 are not extendable

briefdescription.para: Number of PCR log entries to read.
This function illustrates the usage of XilTPM APIs to extend data to PCR index specified in the input.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - TPM PCR event successfully completed.
XST_FAILURE - in case of any failure.//! [TPM example]

briefdescription.para: This function prints the given data on the console.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to any given data buffer

briefdescription.para: Main function to call the TPMExample.
